name: ezyVet Veterinary Practice Management API
what_it_does: ezyVet REST API for veterinary practice management software. Enables AI agents to manage patient (animal) records and owners, retrieve appointment and consultation data, access clinical notes and treatment history, manage invoicing and financial data, handle inventory and dispensing records, integrate with diagnostic lab results, and connect veterinary data with client communication and reminder systems.
use_cases: Managing patient animal records and owner profiles from veterinary operations agents
Scheduling and managing appointment workflows from front desk automation agents
Retrieving clinical notes and treatment history from clinical coordination agents
Sending appointment reminders and health alerts from client communication agents
not_for: Human healthcare without veterinary-specific patient and species management
Pet boarding without clinical veterinary records
Livestock farming without companion animal clinical workflows
best_when: A veterinary clinic, hospital, or practice group using ezyVet wants AI agents to automate appointment scheduling, client communication, clinical record access, and invoicing workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Patient owner personal data and clinical animal health records require careful handling. Client contact data used for reminders must comply with marketing regulations.

auth.notes: ezyVet uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Practice-level credentials. Partner program for third-party integrations. OAuth scopes control access to clinical, financial, and client data. Mars Veterinary Health owned.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — veterinary practice SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-practice monthly pricing; API access included with subscription
pricing.notes: New Zealand-based company, founded 2011. Acquired by Mars Veterinary Health (parent of Banfield, VCA, BluePearl). Cloud-native veterinary PMS with strong integration ecosystem. 10,000+ practices globally.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Pet owner personal data and clinical animal records require careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 partner program
Mars Veterinary Health owned — data governance considerations within Mars ecosystem
New Zealand origin — multi-region data residency (US, AU, EU) — verify for compliance
Clinical species data model (species, breeds, life stages) requires veterinary domain knowledge
Partner program required for third-party integration production access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Pet owner personal data and animal clinical records. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2 with practice-level scoping. Multi-region data residency. Mars Veterinary Health subsidiary.

security_score_components.security_notes: Pet owner and animal clinical data. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. Multi-region data residency (US/AU/EU). Mars subsidiary.
